mapper.insert: INSERT INTO insured_person ( insured_id, application_id, insured_id_no, insured_name, insured_gender, insured_birthdate, contact_phone ) VALUES ( #{insuredId}, #{applicationId}, #{insuredIdNo}, #{insuredName}, #{insuredGender}, #{insuredBirthdate}, #{contactPhone} )
mapper.select: SELECT insured_id, application_id, insured_id_no, insured_name, insured_gender, insured_birthdate, contact_phone FROM insured_person WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE insured_person SET insured_id_no = #{insuredIdNo}, insured_name = #{insuredName}, insured_gender = #{insuredGender}, insured_birthdate = #{insuredBirthdate}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone} WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
